description_long: This is a gold ring featuring a prominent, faceted red gemstone set vertically at its center, flanked by two smaller red gemstones on either side. The band is slightly angular, giving it a geometric and modern appearance. The central gemstone is cut in a pointed, almost crystal-like shape, while the side stones are more squat and faceted. The gold band is smooth and polished, reflecting light with a glossy finish. The overall design is bold and eye-catching, with a focus on symmetry and the striking contrast between the gold and red elements. This piece would stand out as a statement accessory in any urban setting.
description: A gold ring with a large pointed red gemstone at the center and two smaller red stones on the sides, featuring a geometric, polished band.
description_view_0: Front view showing the tall central red gemstone and one smaller side stone, with the gold band tapering towards the base.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting all three red gemstones set atop the gold band, with the central stone most prominent.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, again showing the central and one side gemstone, with the band narrowing below.
description_view_3: Opposite side view to view 1, displaying the trio of red gemstones and the angular gold band.
